# Truncated Gaussian Simulation

**Summary**: A stochastic simulation method used to model ordered geological features.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016]] used truncated Gaussian simulation (TGS) to model the ordered lithofacies and sedimentary sequences.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- TGS was selected for its ability to follow Walter's concept and represent transition changes along carbonate ramps. ([[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016, p. 33]])
